subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! Do ye know in what cycle ye are created and in what age ye exist? This is the age of the Blessed Perfection… If we are not happy and joyous at this season
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان رحمانی هیچ میدانید که در چه کوری مبعوث شده اید و در چه دوری موجود
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
